note: Implemented native splash screen using flutter_native_splash. Added dependency, configured splash with app branding (light background #F5F7FA, app icon centered, Android 12 adaptive icon support). Generated native assets for both Android and iOS. Added splash preservation in main.dart so splash stays visible during Firebase/notification init. Created missing AndroidManifest.xml, Info.plist, and LaunchScreen.storyboard that were needed for asset generation.
